implementation_summary: Updated docs/prompts/docs/release-pinning.md with the first-release pinning decision.
Documented v0.1.0 as the preferred semver tag and full 40-character commit SHA as the temporary pre-tag fallback.
Defined separate final-tag and temporary-commit YAML response records for eino-agent, including go get commands, source commit recording, release notes, and pseudo-version handling.
review_fix_summary: Split the YAML response into final tagged and temporary commit-pin examples.
Made the temporary commit example record the Go pseudo-version returned by go list -m while preserving the source commit SHA.
